title: Musa's Plea in Need
summary: A brief Quranic plea spoken by Musa in need after service, fatigue, and uncertainty about what would come next.
aliases: Rabbi Inni Lima Anzalta Ilayya Min Khayrin Faqir
repeat_guidance: No fixed repetition count is attached in this entry.

supplications.arabic: رَبِّ إِنِّى لِمَآ أَنزَلْتَ إِلَىَّ مِنْ خَيْرٍۢ فَقِيرٌۭ
supplications.transliteration: Rabbi inni lima anzalta ilayya min khayrin faqir.
supplications.translation: My Lord, I am truly in need of whatever good You send down to me.
